name: bootstrap5-templates-starter-js
description: Bootstrap 5 for Jahia — JS/React page template views for bootstrap5-templates-starter
author: Jahia Solutions Group SA

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && yarn pack --out dist/package.tgz
scripts.build:maven: tsc --noEmit && vite build && npm pack && mkdir -p dist && mv bootstrap5-templates-starter-js-*.tgz dist/package.tgz
